entries.title: AI Developer
bulletPoints: Designed, developed, and deployed the entire backend architecture for FairCity (AI platform for public government contract analysis) and helped with EmaAI (business intelligence & AI-agent platform).
Architected a multi-agent AI orchestration pipeline performing autonomous public contract analysis, integrating PDF parsing, OCR, web search, web scraping, fact-checking, and summarization.
Built a custom RAG pipeline using LangChain, PostgreSQL, and VoyageAI embeddings to enable semantic search and context-based LLM reasoning.
Created asynchronous job queues to categorize millions of government contracts using embedding models in parallel, optimizing throughput and resource utilization.
Deployed FastAPI microservices on Hetzner Cloud Linux for high-performance text extraction from PDFs, reducing extraction times and handling thousands of concurrent requests.
Created an interactive node graph to visualize semantic similarity between government contracts, transforming vector data into an intuitive discovery tool.

entries.title: AI Developer
bulletPoints: Built a multi-stage RAG system for university documents, combining semantic FAQ matching, vector search (OpenSearch), BM25, MMR, LLM reranking, and fallback mechanisms for low-confidence answers.
Developed FastAPI backend with asynchronous endpoints, session management, user feedback, dynamic suggestions, and conversation logging.
Engineered text chunking, re-scraping CRON jobs, contextual chunk generation, metadata filters, synthetic FAQ generation, and embedding pipelines using Voyage AI.

entries.title: AI Developer
bulletPoints: Developed an AI chatbot for Czech and Slovak municipalities using LangChain and OpenAI API.
Developed a form-filler functionality for automatically filling out forms using AI and internal data.
Leveraged vector-based search (PGVector) and relational databases (PostgreSQL) to support scalable knowledge management.

entries.title: Think Tank Member & Programmer
bulletPoints: Led a team working on a digital campus project serving over 200,000 students across 10 European universities.
Developed and fine-tuned an AI chatbot tailored to the digital campus, ensuring accurate user query responses.
Managed collaboration and communication with partner universities and state institutions regarding GDPR and AI resolutions.
